fixes.origin:
statement = (
    "SELECT id, tenant, title, body, local_name "
    "FROM content_items "
    "WHERE tenant = '" + tenant + "' "
    "AND category = '" + category + "' "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    f"LIMIT {limit}"
)

cursor.execute(statement)
fixes.replacement:
statement = (
    "SELECT id, tenant, title, body, local_name "
    "FROM content_items "
    "WHERE tenant = ? "
    "AND category = ? "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    "LIMIT ?"
)

cursor.execute(statement, (tenant, category, limit))
